description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named CI that runs on every push to the master branch and on pull requests to the master branch. The workflow should have two jobs: build-linux and build-windows. The build-linux job should run on an ubuntu-latest environment, check out the code, cache Qt, install Qt 5.15.2 with webengine module, and then run qmake and make. The build-windows job should run on a windows-latest environment, check out the code, cache Qt, install Qt 5.15.2 with webengine module, set up the MSVC development environment, and then run qmake and nmake.
